summary: Produced studio-style video. A man in a dark suit speaks to camera standing between an American flag and a Department of Labor flag, with the department seal on the backdrop. Animated text overlays appear beside him reading '$300,000,000 FUNDING' and '1,000,000 ACTIVE APPRENTICES,' and burned-in captions read lines such as 'to expand apprenticeship programs.' The audio is him describing National Apprenticeship Week and registered apprenticeship growth.

script.scene: Man in a suit speaks to camera between US and Department of Labor flags; animated overlays '$300,000,000 FUNDING' and '1,000,000 ACTIVE APPRENTICES.'
